chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. C.P.No. D – 1721 of 2023. 1.For orders on CMA 7405/2023. 2.For orders on o/obj. at flag.A. 3.For orders on CMA 7460/2023. 4.For Hearing of main case. - 29.11.2023. Petitioner Abdul Wahab Phulpoto in person. - 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted. 4. The Petitioner seeks that directions be issued for a subsidy to be paid to him as per a policy of the Government of Sindh but has placed nothing on record to show the existence of any such policy, let alone his entitlement. Furthermore, as regards his allegation of corruption, the Petition is again bereft of any material. Indeed, his entire case is based on a phone call said to have been received form an unnamed person, informing him that he was entitled. As such, the Petition does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ and accordingly stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
